reviews_list.review_title: This is a good college with good facilities.

review_content.Infrastructure: This college is very good. It has all the facilities. It is neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available and hostel facilities are not available. The garden and college are beautiful. We play sports. Food facilities and a library are available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are knowledgeable and qualified. They solve all types of doubts. The pass percentage is 60%. The curriculum makes students industry-ready. Teachers are helpful.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and lab facilities, but average faculty & limited placement support in D. Pharm.

review_content.Placements: The passing out batch of 2024-2025 has a course duration of two years. The placement statistics show that 60–70% of students secure jobs, though this varies by institution. The highest package offered is 4.5 LPA, mainly in reputed pharma sales or production roles, while the lowest package is 1.8 LPA. The average package ranges between 2.5 and 3.0 LPA. Several top companies actively recruit from the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Diploma in Pharmacy (D. Pharma) department is generally well-equipped with essential facilities to support both theoretical and practical learning. The department has specialized laboratories such as the Pharmaceutics Lab, Pharmacology Lab, Pharmaceutical Chemistry Lab, and Pharmacognosy Lab. These labs are equipped with instruments like spectrophotometers, tablet punching machines, and various glassware needed for compounding and analysis. The classrooms are clean, spacious, and well-ventilated. Many classrooms are equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and audio-visual aids to enhance the learning experience.

content.Placements: In my batch placement was good but our seniors placement was not so better than in my batch. I also got the call for 3 months of internship from combined district hospital which was the great opportunity for me. The top offers like Salem marketing executive, food and drugs administration, pharmacologist and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good very modern classrooms with new tables, indoor games, free Wi-Fi and many more. The library facilities is okay but they will not enough to provide all the books which are required. The food of canteen was okay in taste and they have fresh quality of food.

individual_reviews.title: This is a good college with good facilities.

content.Infrastructure: This college is very good. It has all the facilities. It is neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available and hostel facilities are not available. The garden and college are beautiful. We play sports. Food facilities and a library are available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are knowledgeable and qualified. They solve all types of doubts. The pass percentage is 60%. The curriculum makes students industry-ready. Teachers are helpful.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and lab facilities, but average faculty & limited placement support in D. Pharm.

content.Placements: The passing out batch of 2024-2025 has a course duration of two years. The placement statistics show that 60–70% of students secure jobs, though this varies by institution. The highest package offered is 4.5 LPA, mainly in reputed pharma sales or production roles, while the lowest package is 1.8 LPA. The average package ranges between 2.5 and 3.0 LPA. Several top companies actively recruit from the course.
content.Infrastructure: The Diploma in Pharmacy (D. Pharma) department is generally well-equipped with essential facilities to support both theoretical and practical learning. The department has specialized laboratories such as the Pharmaceutics Lab, Pharmacology Lab, Pharmaceutical Chemistry Lab, and Pharmacognosy Lab. These labs are equipped with instruments like spectrophotometers, tablet punching machines, and various glassware needed for compounding and analysis. The classrooms are clean, spacious, and well-ventilated. Many classrooms are equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and audio-visual aids to enhance the learning experience.

individual_reviews.title: Campus is good, hygienic canteen, highly qualified faculty, well-maintained labs, proper classes.

content.Placements: The placement opportunity is normally good. I am doing a Diploma course. According to my course, the placement package is almost good. 2 LPA-3.5 LPA is an average package. In my college, the placement package depends on your course, like what you do, D.Pharma, B.Pharma, or an M.Pharma.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for my college is a clear and green campus. Proper doing practical with labs perform proper seminar hall. In the library good quality books and proper maintenance. Proper computer labs with Wi-Fi, a hygienic canteen, good quality of food, and all things are good and improving day by day.

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023 are open to all the courses. Aspirants can apply by visiting the CTIHS official website (admission.ctgroup.in).

CT Institute of Higher Studies or CTIHS is a prominent part of the CT Group of Institutions. The institute is affiliated to Guru Nanak Dev University, Amritsar and it offers undergraduate programmes in various fields such as Commerce and Management, Humanities, Science, Journalism and Mass Communication, Interior Designing, IT, etc. The institute also provides curricular, co-curricular, and extra-curricular activities to its students.

The students get an advantage of top-class training and best placements through industrial inputs from a number of renowned corporate houses like Merck, L&T, TCS, L&T, ING, Renault Ranbaxy, Honda, etc. The institute has well-experienced faculty and well-equipped infrastructure.

The major highlights of the CT Institute of Higher Studies are as follows:

Candidates seeking admission to all undergraduate courses offered by the CT Institute of Higher Studies can apply online on the official website of the institute. They can fill the online application form and submit the same before the last date. Some quick facts related to CT Institute of Higher Studies admissions are mentioned below:

Read more: CT Institute of Higher Studies Admissions

CT Institute of Higher Studies offers eight undergraduate programmes in full-time mode. It offers BPT and BDesign programmes for a duration of four years each. The BSc programme is offered under four specialisations. All the programmes apart from BDesign and BPT are offered for the duration of three years.

The eligibility criteria along with the duration of CT Institute of Higher Studies courses are mentioned below:

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is wonderful.

content.Placements: 90% of the students were placed in this course. The highest package was around 9 LPA, and the lowest one was about 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Tommy, Reliance, and Coca-Cola. About 95% of students get internships. The roles differ; some students were posted in administrative positions, while others were selected for management teams.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty cool and fine. Every campus has the facilities of Wi-Fi, and the speed of Wi-Fi is so fast and furious. To get the password of Wi-Fi, one has to register yourself with the department. Hostel facilities are fine, and all games are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a good experience.

content.Placements: Around 73 %out of 60 students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.6 LPA. It depends on companies whether they are top or not. The main recruiting team consists of our institution's group, the admin team, and additional members from the government and Naukri.com. In the 6th semester, it is mandatory to do internship programs. Around 80% of students got internships. The roles offered are technical recruiter, web developer, front-end developer, python developer, and data analyst.

Only 20% of students got placed until the college started. Students have to suffer for the internships and jobs; there have been no placement events for our course in 3 years.
content.Infrastructure: They provide the facilities of a library and computer lab but the books are not relevant according to our course, and computers do not have appropriate software. The food is average, the canteens are not clean, in sports and games, our college is pretty good, and medical facilities are provided by the dispensary of the college.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide many facilities, like a gym, canteen, Wi-Fi, and a mess. Everything is good. Classrooms and labs are clean. Overall, the maintenance is good. The canteen is clean, and it provides hygienic food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best institute in Punjab.

content.Placements: I am in the BBA course. The highest salary package offered is 6.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like BYJU'S and Jaro Education visit our college to hire students from our course. Assistant manager and managerial jobs are offered in our course. I will complete my course in 2023. We will get a job in the 5th semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi facility is available in hostels. Classrooms are good and huge here. Labs are also good, and the library is huge. Both non-vegetarian and vegetarian food is available in the canteen. The medical facility is also free of cost. The sports ground is also huge.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best institute in Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi facility is available in hostels. Classrooms are good and huge here. Labs are also good, and the library is huge. reviews.review_heading: Perfect institute for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college lacks behind in every prospect. However, a few staff members are good.

Overall, the building is good, but the college lacks behind in providing facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Proper discipline and good infrastructure with facilities.

Proper playgrounds and courts are available for various sports like cricket, volleyball, football, badminton, etc. The labs are in very good condition along with modern instruments and technology. The classrooms are ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and maintains good discipline.
reviews.review_text: Our college has almost every possible facility. The entire campus has its own Wi-Fi facility, and there are proper labs for every department, i.e., science department, information technology department, journalism department, etc. For the science department, there are a chemistry lab and a physics lab. The computer lab is available on every floor of our college. There is also a proper workshop for engineering departments. A doctor is available from 9 am to 7 pm, along with a nurse. There are var...

reviews.review_heading: Best educational institute.
reviews.review_text: Number one in infrastructure all over Punjab. Well equipped labs to give first hand information to students. Good hostel facilities for students with nutritional food services. Students are always under CCTV survillence whether in class or in labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college and worth the money spent.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure, with well-developed labs, proper internet facilities, projector-embedded classrooms, good medical facilities, many sports and very good exposure to both indoor and outdoor games. The quality of food available is good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Jalandhar, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Our College building is very big. Here are two lifts, big green parks, and playgrounds, big Auditorium, a big separate hostel for boys and girls and also for international students. Big Cafeteria. There are much more central facilities like the best hostel with world-class infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is pretty much good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is pretty much good they provide Wi-Fi with a wide range to access the web for their studies which help them to get their job done easily world-class library provide best and to the point knowledge to the students, campus labs are installed with the latest technology. Sports rooms and playgrounds are also there for recreational activities.

reviews.review_heading: However, now I can see the improvements due to the arrival of our new principal.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Government College for Girls, Ludhiana Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

faqs.answer: A:    Government College for Girls, Ludhiana offers Degree and Diploma courses including 7 UG and 8 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Government College for Girls, Ludhiana has specializations such as M.Sc. specializations in Botany.
faqs.question: What kind of specializations are available in courses offered at Government College for Girls, Ludhiana?

reviews_list.review_title: This college is excellent according to my experience.

review_content.Placements: This college provides a number of courses like B.A. B.Com B.Sc. (medical and non-medical), B.Voc Beauty and wellness, M.Com M.Sc. botany honours and PGDCA. But the disadvantage is there are only regular courses and till now there are no placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is above average but not excellent as classrooms are not well developed. But college campus is excellent. There is a big canteen with budget friendly food, 2 accupressure park, a big ground, botanical garden, meditation park and much more to add on. A lot of greenery can be seen. Hostelers are getting good facilities and good food in the mess. Medical and sports facilities are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good education.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements or internships for science students. Few students grabbed decent salary packages. Our batch got a company providing BPL services but the salary was not good. This was the main problem with this institute as despite providing so many facilities, nowadays, students refer colleges to provide training, internships, and placements in top colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. The laboratory was well-equipped and spacious. Classrooms were also huge. Medical room was available with two beds, and all the facilities were provided for first aid. The canteen was well furnished. The quality of food was good at nominal prices. Hostel facilities were better. The mess was also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A lot of changes are required.

review_content.Placements: They share details of jobs paying 10k per month. This is the ROI they suggest. They barely have contacts in the industry. They need to have a proper placement cell who ensures a proper ROI of to what we are spending not jist monetarily but, also considering the time we are investing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Not upgraded. Teachers don't know about the subjects themselves, teachers don't even know how to communicate in English placement support is zero. I haven't lived in the hostel but, I have visited the hostel infrastructure. It's still manageable as per the charges but, curriculum formulation is not apt.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jyothishmathi Institute of Pharmaceutical Science.

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of members who are selected from our college. The average salary package given at our college is 3.5 LPA. Top pharmaceutical companies visit our college. About 70% of students get placements in different pharmaceutical companies. The top role offered in our college is that of a pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available at our college include labs with sufficient chemicals. There is a library with more than a thousand books. The quality of the facilities provided in our hostel is poor and the mess is not up to the mark. Medical facilities are provided by our seniors who are prior doctors.

reviews_list.review_title: Better college for only Pharma.D not for others like B.Pharma.

review_content.Placements: We have all passed out our 1st year with 6 subjects. Big pharma companies offered recruitment. Our college was better to learn skills, and some students got placements from this college. You did not need to trust placements from college on your skills and internships only get placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am coming to college from home so I didn't know much about the hostel or mess. Labs and classrooms were nice. Sports were conducted yearly with fests and classical connected. But our internships were completed before your course ended.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jyothishmathi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: About 30% of students are placed in our course. No one got an internship from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in our college. Library facilities are excellent, and classrooms are neat. Hostel facilities are very poor. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are available at our college. There are sports and games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. They encourage students in all activities, including studying. The course curriculum is not relevant. It doesn't make students industry-ready. Semester exams will be conducted in a difficult way. The pass percentage is 60%.
